sail_clawloop.current_safe_claim: Phase 1 is complete as a receipt-bound deterministic methods result spanning synthetic structural benchmarks, retained retrospective evidence, prospective simulator predictions, governed agent terminal negatives, TwinWorthiness, the gated Learning Factory, Studio, and a reproducible publication package; it proves no policy win, physical transfer, hardware result, or robot authority, and Phase 2 remains blocked external pending a related workcell and separately granted capture and motion authority

sail_project_application.current_safe_claim: Phase 1 was applied to the full retained evidence compilation and all 11 action-frozen pawn episodes. The bounded contact-model campaign did not repair or promote the simulator, but it localized the visible C2 drop to unilateral rubber contact plus surface-migration and opposing-load collapse, compiled 10 failure classes, and added a non-promoting post-first-lift task diagnostic that reveals three destination entries.

endpoint_owner_review.claim_boundary: qualitative marker acceptance does not establish a metric pawn pose, square-center error, self-centering, drift, policy behavior, or simulator fidelity
